craigslist.title: Fully Renovated 7BR Foxhall Village Corner Home Near Georgetown + Park
craigslist.description: QR Code Link to This Post Fully renovated seven-bedroom, 4,320 sq. ft. corner home in sought-after Foxhall Village, minutes from Georgetown University, embassies, Georgetown, downtown DC, Glover Archbold Park, and Potomac River trails. Set on a rare corner lot, this classic brick residence offers generous living space, abundant natural light, modern updates, flexible living space, driveway parking, and an attached garage. The main level features an open living area with hardwood floors, recessed lighting, built-ins, curved archways, a fireplace, and large picture windows. The dining area flows into a renovated kitchen with stainless steel appliances, sleek cabinetry, modern countertops, and a large central island. The second floor offers four bedrooms, including a spacious primary suite with beautiful corner views of Foxhall Village, plus flexible space for bedrooms, guest rooms, or offices. The top floor is a private oversized suite with a sitting area, fireplace, walk-in closet, and expansive windows with open views and abundant natural light. The fully finished lower level functions as a separate two-bedroom apartment with private entrance, second kitchen, and 1.5 baths ideal for guests, extended family, an au pair, office space, or potential rental/Airbnb use with landlord approval and subject to DC rules. Outside, enjoy a landscaped patio, driveway parking, and an attached garage.
